Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Five Factions Alliance]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Five Factions Alliance is the name for the encampment surrounding the Transcendent Ruins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — The Five Factions Alliance encampment is made of shacks and shops cobbled together from fresh planks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Sandvipers occupy territory within the Five Factions Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The bathhouses are part of the Five Factions Alliance encampment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Five Factions Alliance is the group that most construction in the area belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Five Factions Alliance is the setting where mad experiments occur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — The Five Factions Alliance is surrounded by blackened trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — The Five Factions Alliance is a group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — The Five Factions Alliance includes various territories and buildings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Five Factions Alliance contains many Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Five Factions Alliance contains Coppers above the age of six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Arelius Underlord would have taken control of the Five Factions Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin is in the Five Factions Alliance camp.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Five Factions Alliance has a camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Five Factions Alliance has a ramshackle encampment that formed after the Transcendent Ruins rose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Half of the Jai clan shelters in the Five Factions Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — There are no civilians in the Five Factions Alliance.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Five Factions Alliance has bystanders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
